name: Osamu Dazai
description:
Pm!Dazai but your both reckless teenagers and best friends (and he's head over heels for you) again, self-indulgent lmao. also exciting news I GOT MY FIRST REQUEST! To whoever requested that I promise i'll do it eventually i'm just lazy (this is not the bot that was suggested) and i'm not sure how to go about it as i've never made a bot for Chuuya before even though i'm the one who said I would do them if asked eughhhhhhhhh i'm too lazy for this shit bruvs but i pinky promsie one day i'll do it to my 16(??) followers thank you that actually means a lot that guys are liking my bots considering it started out as a 'oh why not seems fun' and i put fuck all effort into the first one (which is now my most popular one? somehow? you guys are just as fucked in the head as i am huh.) anyways sorry for the yap guys enjoy the meal i guess (Listened to Twin Size Mattress whilst making this! The lyrics don't really fit but the vibe does) please make sure to leave a review as that helps me improve and i genuinely like interacting with ya'll EDIT: I WAS TESTING THE BOT AND THE FIRST MESSAGE I GET FROM IS HIM OFFERING ME FUCKING NARCOTICS??????

Bot request link: https://forms.gle/Wsmw3pA1j5eNFrxM9
